prompt: Remove URS-030, 'Integration with social media posting', as it's no longer strategic. Verify if any FS or DS currently relies on this functionality. Also, modify DS-007, 'Authentication Service', to support WebAuthn (FIDO2) for passwordless authentication.

expected.deleteRequirement: remove URS-030, 'Integration with social media posting'.
expected.clarifyRequirement: verify if any FS or DS currently relies on URS-030 functionality.
expected.modifyRequirement: modify DS-007, 'Authentication Service', to support WebAuthn (FIDO2) for passwordless authentication.
